issues.issueMessage:
Field description: Used to specify the locations and relevant attributes of all source datasets (BIDS or not).
Valid keys in each object include `"URL"`, `"DOI"` (see
[URI](SPEC_ROOT/common-principles.md#uniform-resource-indicator)), and
`"Version"` with
[string](https://www.w3schools.com/js/js_json_datatypes.asp)
values.

Field description: Name of the task.
No two tasks should have the same name.
The task label included in the filename MAY be derived from this `"TaskName"` field
by removing all non-alphanumeric or `+` characters (that is, all except those matching `[0-9a-zA-Z+]`),
and potentially replacing spaces with `+` to ease readability.
For example `"TaskName"` `"faces n-back"` or `"head nodding"` could correspond to task labels
`faces+n+back` or `facesnback` and `head+nodding` or `headnodding`, respectively.

Field description: Manufacturer's designation of software version of the equipment that produced
the measurements.

Field description: The serial number of the equipment that produced the measurements.
A pseudonym can also be used to prevent the equipment from being
identifiable, so long as each pseudonym is unique within the dataset.

Field description: Can be used if all electrodes are of the same manufacturer
(for example, `"AD-TECH"`, `"DIXI"`).
If electrodes of different manufacturers are used,
please use the corresponding table in the `_electrodes.tsv` file.

Field description: If different electrode types are used,
please use the corresponding table in the `_electrodes.tsv` file.
Field description: Text of the instructions given to participants before the recording.

Field description: The name of the institution in charge of the equipment that produced the
measurements.

Field description: The address of the institution in charge of the equipment that produced the
measurements.

Field description: The department in the institution in charge of the equipment that produced
the measurements.

Field description: Defines the specific type of physiological recording.
For backwards compatibility, the default value is `"generic"`.

Field description: Name of the task.
No two tasks should have the same name.
The task label included in the filename MAY be derived from this `"TaskName"` field
by removing all non-alphanumeric or `+` characters (that is, all except those matching `[0-9a-zA-Z+]`),
and potentially replacing spaces with `+` to ease readability.
For example `"TaskName"` `"faces n-back"` or `"head nodding"` could correspond to task labels
`faces+n+back` or `facesnback` and `head+nodding` or `headnodding`, respectively.

codeMessages.TOO_FEW_AUTHORS:
The 'Authors' field of 'dataset_description.json' should contain an array of values -
with one author per value.
This was triggered based on the presence of only one author field.
Please ignore if all contributors are already properly listed.
codeMessages.JSON_KEY_RECOMMENDED: A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
codeMessages.EXCESSIVE_ELECTRODE_SPECIFICITY:
Task, acquisition or run entities detected in electrodes.tsv.
Electrode definitions should generally not vary within a session.
Consider removing the excess entity/entities or create a new
session each time electrodes are reconfigured.
codeMessages.SIDECAR_KEY_RECOMMENDED: A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
codeMessages.EVENTS_TSV_MISSING:
Task scans should have a corresponding 'events.tsv' file.
If this is a resting state scan you can ignore this warning or rename the task to include the word "rest".
